privileged_info_summary: The task involves implementing a litigation hold for case 'Meridian Corp v. Acme Industries' (Case No. 2025-CV-04891). Two in-scope documents are identified: 'Phoenix-Initiative-Proposal' and 'Phoenix-Budget-Analysis', both referencing Project Phoenix and the Meridian partnership. One out-of-scope decoy is 'Marketing-Campaign-Summary', which contains no Phoenix references and must not be held. Required actions include applying 'legal-hold' tag to in-scope documents, adding preservation comments referencing case 2025-CV-04891, removing 'outside-counsel' user access from held documents, and creating a collection titled 'Litigation Hold - Meridian v Acme' containing the in-scope documents. All task data is synthetic, generated by the setup script for testing document management capabilities.
